summary: Iteration 74 - Transaction Modeler & Client Creation features fully tested. Backend: 18/18 tests passed for transaction modeling (property/fund/stock) and CRM client CRUD APIs. Frontend: All Transaction Modeler tabs working (Property, Fund, Stock) with comprehensive impact analysis, Client Modal opens from CRM with all required fields, client creation works, Model Transaction button navigates correctly from Client 360 to Transaction Modeler.
critical_code_review_comments: Transaction Modeler correctly displays Upfront Costs (Deposit $170,000, Stamp Duty $33,548, Legal & Other $6,750 = $210,298 total)
Annual Cash Flow shows rental income, loan repayments, net cash flow and positively/negatively geared indicator
10-Year Projection calculates Capital Growth, Rental Income, Total Return and ROI percentage
Fund tab shows investment details, expected returns after fees, and 10-year projections
Stock tab shows trade details, brokerage, and 5-year projections (Conservative/Moderate/Aggressive)
Stock sell scenario correctly calculates CGT with 50% discount for holdings > 12 months
Client Modal has all required fields: name, email, phone, address, type, status, risk profile, adviser, annual income, notes
Client creation API POST /api/crm/clients works correctly and generates unique client_id
Client update API PUT /api/crm/clients/{id} works correctly
seed_data_creation: Test clients created with TEST_ prefix for cleanup identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 74 verified Transaction Modeler & Client Creation features: 1) Transaction Modeler at /transaction-modeler loads with Property/Fund/Stock tabs, 2) Property tab models buy scenarios with upfront costs (deposit, stamp duty, legal fees), annual cash flow (rental income, loan repayments, positively/negatively geared), and 10-year projection, 3) Fund tab models investment with returns after fees and 10-year projections, 4) Stock tab models buy/sell with trade details, brokerage, and 5-year projections or CGT calculations for sells, 5) CRM Command Center New Client button opens ClientModal, 6) ClientModal has fields: name*, email*, phone, address, type, status, risk_profile, adviser, annual_income, notes, 7) Create Client button calls POST /api/crm/clients which returns success with new client_id, 8) Client 360 View has Model Transaction button that navigates to /transaction-modeler?client={id}. Note: localStorage.setItem('wealth_command_compliance_v5', 'permanent') bypasses compliance modal.

mocked_apis.CRM_client_data: MOCKED - All client data is mocked in backend/routes/crm.py
mocked_apis.Transaction_modeling: REAL - Calculations are real but client context is simulated
mocked_apis.Saved_scenarios: MOCKED - Returns sample scenarios from backend

features_verified.property_tab_buy_scenario: PASS - Models property purchase with upfront costs, cash flow, 10-year projection
features_verified.property_upfront_costs_display: PASS - Shows deposit ($170,000), stamp duty ($33,548), legal ($6,750), total ($210,298)
features_verified.property_annual_cash_flow_display: PASS - Shows rental income (+$21,250), loan repayments (-$51,577), net cash flow (-$30,327)
features_verified.property_10_year_projection: PASS - Shows capital growth ($534,560), rental income ($212,500), total return ($747,060), ROI (355.2%)
features_verified.fund_tab_investment_modeling: PASS - Models fund investment with details and 10-year projections
features_verified.stock_tab_buy_modeling: PASS - Models stock purchase with trade details and 5-year projections
features_verified.stock_tab_sell_with_cgt: PASS - Models stock sale with CGT calculation including 50% discount
features_verified.client_creation_api: PASS - POST /api/crm/clients returns 200 with success and client data
features_verified.client_update_api: PASS - PUT /api/crm/clients/{id} returns 200 with updated client
features_verified.model_transaction_navigates_correctly: PASS - Clicking navigates to /transaction-modeler with client context

api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/transaction-modeling/property: PASS - Returns property analysis with purchase_costs, loan_details, cash_flow, summary
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/transaction-modeling/fund: PASS - Returns fund analysis with investment_details, annual_analysis, projections, summary
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/transaction-modeling/stock: PASS - Returns stock analysis with trade_details, projections/cgt_analysis based on buy/sell
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/transaction-modeling/comprehen: PASS - Returns combined impact for multiple transactions
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/crm/clients: PASS - Returns clients list with summary
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/crm/clients: PASS - Creates new client with unique client_id
